name: Eline Entertainment Group, Inc.
summary: Eline Entertainment Group, Inc., through its subsidiary Graystone Education, Inc., provides various education services. It also offers consulting services to public and private institutions, including charter schools, private k-12 schools, and higher education institutions at the undergraduate and graduate level. The company was formerly known as Influential Media Holdings, Inc. and changed its name to Eline Entertainment Group, Inc. in August 2018. Eline Entertainment Group, Inc. is based in West Palm Beach, Florida.
